queries.question: List each stadium and its seating capacity and maximum occupancy.
queries.sql: select name, Seating_Capacity, Maximum_Occupancy from stadiums
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?seating_capacity ?maximum_occupancy WHERE {
  ?stadiums a :Stadiums .
  ?stadiums p:name ?name .
  ?stadiums p:Seating_Capacity ?seating_capacity .
  ?stadiums p:Maximum_Occupancy ?maximum_occupancy .
}

queries.question: show me the capacity of each stadium
